subject: media: usb: em28xx: Replace GFP_ATOMIC with GFP_KERNEL in em28xx_init_usb_xfer()
notes: Seed is dgfp (delay-gfp / DCNS) pattern, not four-features resource lifecycle.
Adapted features schema: target_api=usb_submit_urb / any gfp_t-taking function, post_operation=N/A, critical_variable=gfp flag arg, path_conditions=enclosing func not callable from atomic context.
Compositional decomposition into 6 named predicates as required by C2 (3-6).
Single compile error during predicate development (MacroInvocation cast incompatible with Expr) — fixed in iter1 of is_gfp_atomic.
Final assembled .ql compiled clean on first attempt.
